findings.detail: Side-by-side two-column contrast matches the intent exactly: left panel shows Prompt Core (Positive Instruction -> Positive Reframe), right panel shows four Constraint Guardrail layers in order (Format -> Tone -> Content Exclusion -> Scope Limit). Placement annotation (system prompt = persistent, user prompt = one turn) is embedded in the right subgraph title subtitle. Layout LR with two direction-TB inner subgraphs follows the canonical side-by-side panels pattern.

All 6 node labels trace directly to corpus Section 5: 'Positive Instruction' (5.1), 'Positive Reframe' (5.3), 'Format Constraint', 'Tone Constraint', 'Content Exclusion', 'Scope Limit' (all 5.4). No advanced or adjacent concepts from neighbouring topics introduced.
All bold node labels are 2 words each, well within the 4-word limit. Subtitles use 12px font (raised from default 11px), legible at 1400px render width.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (valid flowchart LR with nested direction TB subgraphs)
preflight.label_discipline: pass (all bold labels 2 words each, <= 4-word limit)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels match corpus sections 5.1, 5.3, 5.4; on-headline)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in title: config field, no ghost node)
preflight.single_path: n/a (intent explicitly calls for side-by-side contrast panels)

stats.layout: flowchart LR (two direction-TB subgraphs, side-by-side panels)
stats.note: PNG render requires mmdc (Mermaid CLI) on PATH. Run the render_command above to produce diagram.png. Source-level pre-flight passed; visual inspection pending render.
